description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:latest Docker image, with mysql:latest and postgres:latest services, and a pip cache at ~/.cache/pip/. Define a global variable POSTGRES_DB=database_name. Add a test job (default stage) that runs the before_script commands python -V and pip install -r requirements.txt, then executes python manage.py test, and sets a job‑specific variable DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:postgres@postgres:5432/$POSTGRES_DB. The pipeline has no explicit stages, artifacts, or rules, and runs on any branch.
